active_ingredients: Active ingredients (in each caplet) Acetaminophen 500 mg Diphenhydramine HCl 25 mg
indications_and_usage: Uses temporary relief of occasional headaches and minor aches and pains with accompanying sleeplessness
dosage_and_administration: Directions Do not take more than directed. See overdose warning adults and children 12 years and over take 2 caplets at bedtime do not take more than 2 caplets of this product in 24 hours children under 12 years do not use
overdosage: Overdose warning: In case of overdose, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away (1-800-222-1222). Quick medical attention is critical for adults as well as for children even if you do not notice any signs or symptoms.
